message.content:
{
  "analysis": "The image and stdout are already exact. The only remaining mismatch is stderr: the original emits 600 `Progress: %.1f%%` updates after `Rendering high-resolution image...`, with the first preceded by `\r`, subsequent ones preceded by `\r`, and the final `Progress: 99.8%` followed by `\nRendering complete\n`. Panel 2 derived a candidate formula, but it has not been verified against all 600 original values. I will first verify the exact progress formula in Python before editing /app/mystery.c.",
  "plan": "Run a Python script that extracts the 600 original progress values from /tmp/orig_stderr.txt and compares them against the candidate formula `0.1*y + 0.1*(y - (y+1)/3)` for y=0..599. If this formula matches all 600 values exactly, I will use it. If not, I will test alternative formulas. No source edit will be made until the formula is verified.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cd /app; python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import re
b=Path('/tmp/orig_stderr.txt').read_bytes()
orig=[float(m.group(1)) for m in re.finditer(rb'Progress: ([0-9.]+)%', b)]
print('count',len(orig))
cands=[]
formulas={
 'panel2_y0_599': [0.1*y + 0.1*(y - (y+1)//3) for y in range(600)],
 'linear_99.8_599': [i*99.8/599.0 for i in range(600)],
 'linear_100_600': [i*100.0/600.0 for i in range(600)],
}
for name,vals in formulas.items():
    ok=all(abs(round(vals[i],1)-orig[i])<1e-9 for i in range(min(len(orig),len(vals))))
    print(name, 'len', len(vals), 'match', ok)
    if not ok:
        print('first mismatches', [(i, round(vals[i],1), orig[i]) for i in range(600) if abs(round(vals[i],1)-orig[i])>=1e-9][:10])
    else:
        print('first10', [round(v,1) for v in vals[:10]], 'last10', [round(v,1) for v in vals[-10:]])
# Also verify formatting exactly: one decimal, no trailing zeros
fmt=[f'{v:.1f}' for v in orig]
fmt2=[f'{round(0.1*y + 0.1*(y - (y+1)//3),1):.1f}' for y in range(600)]
print('fmt_match_panel2', fmt==fmt2, 'sample', fmt[:5], fmt[-5:])
PY
",
      "duration": 0.1
    }
  ]
}
